description:
*Features*:

  • *Render Yourself A Peaceful Sleep*:Our memory foam pillows are great for side sleepers,back sleepers and stomach sleepers. The pliable memory foam conforms to the shape of your head and body keeping the spinal column in your neck and back aligned properly.
  • *Help Relieve Some Sleeping Ailments*:This pillow conforms to your head and neck to relieve suffering from stress and tension. It can help provide relief from several sleeping issues including snoring,insomnia,migraines,neck and back pain.
  • *Breathable*:Made of hypoallergenic materials that help resist mold,bacteria and dust mites. The breathable cover keeps your pillow dry and provides maximum comfort.
  • *Washable Zippered Cover*:Our hypoallergenic bamboo pillow cases are a great alternative to down or latex pillows. The pillow covers are machine washable. Note:Do not wash the filling.
  • *Perfect Gift*:This memory foam pillow is comfortable,can provide a restful sleep and will not cause burden for those who has sleep ailments;ideal gift for who you care about and yourself.
Some tips to help your compressed pillow fluff up faster: 
- Gently pat and shake the pillow to loosen the filling for 20 minutes. 
- Stretch the pillow in all directions slightly to encourage the  filling s to expand.
- If the pillow hasn’t fully returned to its original size after these steps, don’t worry! Just place it in a well-ventilated area with some sunlight for 3–7 days, and it will naturally fluff up over time. This timeframe is because the pillow has been in a compressed state during shipping and storage, so the materials need a little extra time to fully relax and regain their shape. Thank you for your patience!

*Specifications*:

  • Product Type: Memory Foam Pillows
  • Color: White
  • Material: 60% polyester, 40% bamboo Rayon
  • Filling: 100% shredded memory foam (polyurethane foam)
  • 1Pcs Queen Pillow Size (Unfolded): 71x45x20cm/28×17.7×7.9in
  • 1Pcs Queen Pillow Weight: 2.2kg/4.85lbs
  • 1Pcs King Pillow Size(Unfolded): 91 x 45 x20cm/35.8 × 17.7 × 7.9in
  • 1Pcs King Pillow Weight: 2.4kg/5.3lbs
  • 1Pcs Queen Package Size: 17x17x41cm/6.69x6.69x16.14in
  • 1Pcs Queen Package Weight: 2.2kg/4.85lbs
  • 2Pcs Queen Package Size: 44x37x19cm/17.32x14.56x7.48in
  • 2Pcs Queen Package Weight: 3.95kg/8.71lbs
  • 1Pcs King Package Size: 43*19*19cm/16.92*7.48*7.48in
  • 1Pcs King Package Weight:2679g/5.90lbs
  • 2Pcs King Package Size: 36*19*43cm/14.17*7.48*16.92in
  • 2Pcs King Package Weight: 5.25kg/11.5lbs

*2Pcs Pillows Package Lists*:

  • 2 x Memory Foam Pillow
  • 1 x User Manual

*1Pc Pillow Package Lists*:

  • 1 x Memory Foam Pillow
  • 1 x User Manual
